texto: Since we launched the original 'Pop Idol' in England, I've remained close with Simon Fuller. Working as executive producer on 'American idol' for its first seven years not only was an inspirational journey into the heart of American pop culture, it opened my eyes to the untapped potential of the incredibly dynamic young people in this world.
explicacao: Citação de Nigel Lythgoe sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Since we launched the original 'Pop Idol' in England, I've remained close with Simon Fuller. Work…” articula motivacao, journey, culture em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e inspiracao.
